details: The agent correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z (Pending) -> PVC data-cache (Pending/unbound) -> StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist. All conclusions were supported by actual kubectl commands run against the cluster, including kubectl get pods, kubectl describe pod, kubectl get pvc, kubectl describe pvc (which showed the ProvisioningFailed event explicitly stating 'storageclass.storage.k8s.io "fast-ssd" not found'), and kubectl get storageclass (confirming only 'standard' exists). The agent provided the complete causal chain required for full credit.
